# HikamersSearch - LLM Information

## About
HikamersSearch is a tweet search engine for the Hikamer community (Hikakin fans).

## Allowed
- Crawling public pages
- Using search API for research
- Indexing content

## API
- Search: /api/tweets/stream?q={query}
- Suggestions: /api/suggestions?q={query}

## Contact
https://x.com/maebahesioru2
